queries.question: Where did each doctor have their last appointment and when was that place founded?
queries.sql: SELECT Doctors.Healthcare_Facility, Doctors.Founding_Year FROM Doctors JOIN Appointments ON Appointments.DoctorID = Doctors.DoctorID ORDER BY Appointments.Date DESC, Appointments.Time DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?healthcare_facility ?founding_year WHERE {
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?appointments p:hasDoctors ?doctors .
  ?doctors p:Healthcare_Facility ?healthcare_facility .
  ?doctors p:Founding_Year ?founding_year .
  ?appointments p:Date ?date_o .
  ?appointments p:Time ?time_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o) DESC(?time_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: Where did each doctor have their last appointment, who owned it and when was it founded?
queries.sql: SELECT Doctors.Healthcare_Facility, Doctors.Founding_Year, Past_Owners FROM Doctors JOIN Appointments ON Appointments.DoctorID = Doctors.DoctorID ORDER BY Appointments.Date DESC, Appointments.Time DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?healthcare_facility ?founding_year ?past_owners WHERE {
  ?doctors a :Doctors .

  ?appointments p:hasDoctors ?doctors .
  ?doctors p:Healthcare_Facility ?healthcare_facility .
  ?doctors p:Founding_Year ?founding_year .
  ?doctors p:Past_Owners ?past_owners .
  ?appointments p:Date ?date_o .
  ?appointments p:Time ?time_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o) DESC(?time_o)
LIMIT 1

queries.question: In what year was the hospital where Carol Williams received her care founded? Also, show that hospital and who were the past owners.
queries.sql: SELECT Doctors.Healthcare_Facility, Doctors.Founding_Year, Past_Owners FROM Doctors JOIN Appointments ON Appointments.DoctorID = Doctors.DoctorID JOIN Patients On Patients.PatientID = Appointments.PatientID WHERE Patients.FirstName = 'Carol' AND Patients.LastName = 'Williams'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?healthcare_facility ?founding_year ?past_owners WHERE {
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?appointments p:hasDoctors ?doctors .
  ?patients a :Patients .
  ?appointments p:hasPatients ?patients .
  ?doctors p:Healthcare_Facility ?healthcare_facility .
  ?doctors p:Founding_Year ?founding_year .
  ?doctors p:Past_Owners ?past_owners .
  ?patients p:FirstName ?firstname_f .
  ?patients p:LastName ?lastname_f .
  FILTER(STR(?firstname_f) = STR("Carol"))
  FILTER(STR(?lastname_f) = STR("Williams"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Where was the last doctor's appointment and what is the history of this place?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?healthcare_facility ?founding_year WHERE {
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?appointments p:hasDoctors ?doctors .
  ?doctors p:Healthcare_Facility ?healthcare_facility .
  ?doctors p:Founding_Year ?founding_year .
  ?appointments p:Date ?date_o .
  ?appointments p:Time ?time_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o) DESC(?time_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  full: { SELECT ?healthcare_facility ?founding_year ?past_owners WHERE {
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?appointments p:hasDoctors ?doctors .
  ?doctors p:Healthcare_Facility ?healthcare_facility .
  ?doctors p:Founding_Year ?founding_year .
  ?doctors p:Past_Owners ?past_owners .
  ?appointments p:Date ?date_o .
  ?appointments p:Time ?time_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o) DESC(?time_o)
LIMIT 1 }
  component_2: { SELECT ?healthcare_facility ?past_owners WHERE {
  ?doctors a :Doctors .
  ?appointments a :Appointments .
  ?appointments p:hasDoctors ?doctors .
  ?doctors p:Healthcare_Facility ?healthcare_facility .
  ?doctors p:Past_Owners ?past_owners .
  ?appointments p:Date ?date_o .
  ?appointments p:Time ?time_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date_o) DESC(?time_o)
LIMIT 1 }
}
